title: rubus macrotrichus
intro: Rubus macrotrichus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus macrotrichus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus macrotrichus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
